title: [DOCS] Podmans minumum supported runc version should be updated
body:
This issue was discovered as part of https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27239#issuecomment-3374046241

We now expect users to be running at least runc v1.1.11 and thus should update the docs at: https://podman.io/docs/installation#crun--runc

comments.body:
I've submitted a PR to address this issue. It updates the minimum required runc version to v1.1.11 in the installation guide. 

You can review the changes here: https://github.com/containers/podman.io/pull/441

@nimdrak: You can't close an active issue/PR unless you authored it or you are a collaborator.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/27243#issuecomment-3387794544):

>/close


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes-sigs/prow](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/prow/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
